name: EsDeeKid
description:
'''EsDeeKid''' is a British rapper from [[Liverpool|Liverpool, England]]. He released his debut album, ''[[Rebel (EsDeeKid album)|Rebel]]'', in June 2025. He has been noted as a prominent figure in the [[UK underground rap]] scene. His music is characterised by his thick [[Scouse]] accent and draws inspiration from [[cloud rap]]. He covers his face with a [[Balaclava (clothing)|balaclava]], and keeps his name, appearance, and age private. He still lives in his [[council house]]. 

As of January 2026, EsDeeKid's single "[[Phantom (EsDeeKid and Rico Ace song)|Phantom]]" (with Rico Ace) has accumulated more than 170 million streams. His album ''Rebel'' has charted in multiple European countries, as well as peaked at number 23 on the US [[Billboard 200|'' Billboard'' 200]], despite being released nearly five months before its debut on the chart.
